item.title: Ollama default model name 'llama3:8b' hardcoded across 7 locations
item.intent: Ollama default model has a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No literal model name string appears in runtime code outside that file.
item.description: The Ollama default model 'llama3:8b' is hardcoded in 7 locations across 5 files: src/design/configure/ollama.ts:10 (const DEFAULT_MODEL = 'llama3:8b'), src/design/configure/smart.ts:51 (const DEFAULT_LOCAL_MODEL = 'llama3:8b'), src/design/configure/wizard.ts:61 (const DEFAULT_LOCAL_MODEL = 'llama3:8b'), src/web/server.tsx:238 (fallback string literal), src/evolve/migrate/extract.ts:77 (?? fallback), src/evolve/memory/summarize.ts:56 (?? fallback). Same pattern as BUG-025 (Ollama URL) and BUG-026 (WhatsApp API version). Steps: (1) add OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL = 'llama3:8b' to src/config/defaults.ts; (2) import and replace runtime literals in ollama.ts:10, smart.ts:51, wizard.ts:61, server.tsx:238, extract.ts:77, summarize.ts:56; (3) web/pages/init.tsx:59 HTML placeholder text can stay as-is (presentational); (4) run design/, evolve/, and web/ tests to confirm no regression. Scope: 6 files, ~8 lines changed. Zero logic change — pure constant extraction.
